description: Integrates Reality Capture Engine with Predicted Build Sandbox, Time Engine, and Global Atlas.

unification_loop.description: Continuous closed-loop pipeline from capture to corrective action.

steps.name: reality_capture
steps.action: Ingest normalized point_clouds, mesh_models, image_sets from spatial_device_adapters.

steps.name: compare_design
steps.action: Diff raw_as_built_snapshot against BIM design model from Predicted Build Sandbox.

steps.name: compare_planned
steps.action: Diff raw_as_built_snapshot against planned schedule geometry from Time Engine.

steps.name: detect_deviation
steps.action: Merge design_deviation_report and schedule_deviation_report. Flag elements exceeding tolerance.

steps.name: suggest_correction
steps.action: Generate correction recommendations per flagged element. Route to responsible trade and RFI system.

steps.name: update_sandbox
steps.action: Push verified as-built geometry to Predicted Build Sandbox, update Global Atlas as-built layer, log to Time Engine.
